rationale: Review 1's approve is sound: the new content is genuinely new and Mathlib is correctly reused. Review 2's one valid reuse point (expose private helpers) is outweighed by findings 2-5, which wrongly call the new public lemmas (stated over TauCeti's own map/includeRight defs) redundant duplicates of Mathlib lemmas; acting on them deletes intended API and degrades the PR.
